body_preview: Fix the recurring "grep: unmatched ( or \\(" error that appears 3× in the CI trajectory feedback. This is a harness noise issue — the evolution pipeline's grep calls use literal parentheses in patterns without proper escaping, causing spurious error output that pollutes CI logs and may cause grep to silently fail on some pattern matches. Why this matters: Th
title: Fix recurring grep escape errors in evolve.sh
